internal_protection: DC reverse polarity, grid fault, lightning protection
automatic_operation: Complete automatic including wake-up, synchronization, shutdown
cooling_system: Fan or appropriate heat sink required
label_information: Manufacturer name, Brand/Model/Type, Rated power (W or VA), Input/output voltage and frequency, Max input voltage, MPPT voltage range, Serial number
flicker_limit: Within IEC 61000-3-3 for <16A or IEC 61000-3-5 for ≥16A systems
voltage_range: 400V ±10% for three phase, 230V ±10% for single phase
anti_islanding_requirement: Must comply with IEC 62116:2014 test procedure for islanding prevention measures
